pages.text_excerpt: --> About Meg | Meg Hillier MP top of page MEG HILLIER MP Standing up for Hackney South and Shoreditch Home About Meg News Hackney News Monthly Reports Parliament News Committee News Weekly News News Archive Weekly News Archive Contact Advice Surgeries More FAQs Visit Parliament PMQs Ballot More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. ABOUT MEG Meg Hillier is the Member of Parliament for Hackney South and Shoreditch and Chair of the Treasury Select Committee. The committee examines the expenditure, administration and policy of HM Treasury, HM Revenue & Customs, and associated public bodies, including the Bank of England and the Financial Conduct Authority. ​ ​ Meg also chairs the Liaison Committee – a committee comprised of all select committee Chairs. It considers the overall work of select committees, promotes effective scrutiny of Government, and questions the Prime Minister. From 2015-2024, she was Chair of the Public Accounts Committee – the cross-party committee that scrutinises the value for money of public spending and holds the Government to account for the delivery of public services. First elected in 2005, Meg has been a Home Office Minister and Shadow Secretary of State for Energy and Climate Change. Recent Posts April 2026 Monthly Report See here for what I've been up to in Hackney and Westminster in March. headings: h3: Standing up for Hackney South and Shoreditch
pages.text_excerpt: --> Contact | Meg Hillier MP top of page MEG HILLIER MP Standing up for Hackney South and Shoreditch Home About Meg News Hackney News Monthly Reports Parliament News Committee News Weekly News News Archive Weekly News Archive Contact Advice Surgeries More FAQs Visit Parliament PMQs Ballot More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. CONTACT ME Meg aims to reply to all requests for assistance within 10 working days but sometimes, with very complex cases or at times of peak demand, it may occasionally take a little longer. ​ For enquiries on policy matters, we aim to respond within 10 working days but at busy times we prioritise personal cases and the response time for policy enquiries and write in campaigns can extend. ​ If you have not had a response to an enquiry, please call Meg’s office on 0207 219 5325. ​ You can view Meg's privacy policy here . First name Last name Address Post Code Email Your message Submit Write to Meg You can write to me at: House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Phone Meg You can phone or fax Meg Telephone: 020 7219 5325 Email Meg You can email Meg on meg.hillier.mp@parliament.uk Copyright © Meg Hillier | Privacy Policy bottom of page

ADVICE SURGERIES I hold regular advice surgeries at Hackney Town Hall, between 10 and 12pm for constituents who would like to speak about their issues face-to face. This is a drop-in service, so no appointment is necessary. My surgeries are for my constituents only. You can find out who your MP is by entering your postcode into this website: www.writetothem.com My next surgery will be on Monday 11 May 2026.
